title: Bike Sharing — Clustering
description: Unsupervised structure: a 3D PCA scatter, a silhouette plot, a dendrogram of months, and an interactive k-means sweep.

blocks.title: PCA of day-types (colored by season)
blocks.description: Each day projected onto its first three principal components; season falls out without being given to PCA.

blocks.title: Hierarchical clustering of months
blocks.description: Average-linkage over standardized monthly profiles — the summer months merge first.

blocks.title: k-means sweep over k
blocks.description: Drag the slider to re-cluster; the mean silhouette in each label peaks at the natural k.
